name: toggle-group
title: Toggle Group
description: Segmented single- or multi-select control built on Radix.

props.name: type
props.description: Whether one or many items can be active.

props.name: variant
props.description: Item styling; inherited by items via context.

props.name: size
props.description: Item height; inherited by items via context.

notes: Foundational form primitive; ideal for unit switches, route selection, ROS toggles. Ported from petals_ui unchanged.
